rag_rules: Repair only AGREE clauses that directly resolve validator-type errors, without altering AADL structure or adding new components.
Delete clauses containing unresolved identifiers or invalid type references instead of attempting to infer missing declarations.
generic_rules: Ensure all AGREE expressions use only visible AADL features or locally declared eq/const helpers.
Match scalar types strictly to int, real, or bool; reject AGREE references to AADL property names as variables.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use 'eq' to define intermediate boolean or numeric helpers before referencing them in guarantees.
Guarantees must express relations over visible ports or locally declared constants, not subcomponent paths.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as if they are AGREE variables.
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not declared in the model or its with clauses.
